ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., FOU, HUT, BUL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock split was reversed, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock (considering splits and dividends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares purchased */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio stock entry was modified */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock holding (quantity * current_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market indicator data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the market indicator data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market indicator */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the market indicator */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the market indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "stock_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock news entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the news article to the stock (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the stock as per the analyst */,
  "rating_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the rating expires */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analyst account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the analyst account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., fundamental analysis, technical analysis) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the prediction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
